ddls:
CREATE TABLE "version_releases" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release */,
  "release_version" TEXT /* Version number of the release */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the release was made */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor responsible for the release */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the release */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the release */,
  "release_status" TEXT /* Status of the release (draft, published, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_releases_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editors" (
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each editor */,
  "editor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the editor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the editor */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editors_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "modifications" (
  "modification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each modification */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release in which the modification occurred */,
  "clauses_modified" TEXT /* Clauses or sections modified in the release */,
  "modification_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the modification */,
  "discussion_reference" TEXT /* Reference to discussions or meetings that led to the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("modification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_modifications_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the issue */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release to which the issue pertains */,
  "issue_status" TEXT /* Status of the issue (open, resolved, closed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change log entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release associated with the log */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was logged */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor who logged the change */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, editor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's permissions and responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "editor_release_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the editor's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the editor's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_release_history_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_editor_release_history_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release */,
  "dependent_release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dependent release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_dependencies_dependent_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_dependencies_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the release */,
  "editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the editor */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_release_id FOREIGN KEY ("release_id") REFERENCES version_releases ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("editor_id") REFERENCES editors ("editor_id")
)
